query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NULL OR attractions = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_attractions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NOT NULL AND attractions != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_attractions,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN attractions IS NOT NULL AND attractions != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 1) as attractions_coverage_percent
FROM island_guides
